title: Laundry Room Cease and Desist
text:
## Laundry Room Cease and Desist

**To:** Resident {person}, Unit {number}

**Re:** Unauthorized use of {adjective} dryer settings

You are hereby ordered to stop {verb ending in -ing} {plural noun} belonging to other tenants.

**Violations observed:**
- Removing {color} socks before the cycle ends
- Leaving {adjective} lint in the {object} trap
- Playing {adjective} music at {number} decibels

**Penalty:** {number} days without access to the {place}.

**Compliance:** Sign below and promise to {verb} only your own {clothing item}.

**Landlord:** {person}, Esq.
